evidence_summary: Diff hygiene passed, focused primitive/native checks passed, and `cabal build all && cabal test` passed with 2581 examples and 0 failures. The current head satisfies the milestone-1 completion signal by making frontend builtins, backend IR, checked-program conversion, and LLVM lowering consume `MLF.Primitive.Inventory` as the primitive owner while keeping lowerer implementation details local. Full validation also re-touched tracked `runtime/mlfp_io/target/release/libmlfp_io.d` with worktree-local path data; that generated file is outside the approved scope.

completion_pointers.text: round-239 moved LLVM lowering primitive-name/support coverage to MLF.Primitive.Inventory, kept lowerer wrapper/runtime details local, and passed focused primitive checks plus cabal build all && cabal test.

history_entries.text: round-239 completed milestone-1 by finishing the LLVM lowering primitive-inventory adapter and passing the full verification gate.
